ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was created */,
  "cumulative_planned" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of vaccinations planned */,
  "cumulative_administered" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of vaccinations administered */,
  "cumulative_stock_received" INTEGER /* Cumulative vaccine stock received */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_plans_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_population" INTEGER /* Target population for the campaign */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the campaign is conducted */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used in the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "budget_allocated" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "budget_spent" INTEGER /* Budget spent on the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_campaigns_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the data belongs to */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccinations were administered */,
  "num_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate (percentage) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data is collected */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the vaccinated population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the vaccinated population */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  "side_effects_reported" INTEGER /* Number of reported side effects */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, health official, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the user is associated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_stock" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the stock belongs to */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine received */,
  "quantity_received" INTEGER /* Quantity of vaccine received */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was received */,
  "vaccine_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the vaccine batch */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the vaccine is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_stock_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
